LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armor: An advanced helmet designed for Enclave soldiers, offering exceptional protection against ballistic, blunt, and heat damage. Equipped with integrated systems for toxic environment resistance.
The Mk II variant of the Advanced Power Armor Helmet, featuring enhanced durability and improved environmental resistance for hazardous conditions.
Enclave Advanced Power Armor Mk II Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Hellfire_Power_Armor: A heavy-duty helmet for the Hellfire Power Armor, offering unparalleled protection and resistance to extreme environmental conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Power_Armor_Helm: The standard helmet for the X02 Power Armor, providing balanced protection and advanced features for Enclave operatives in the field.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Tesla_Power_Armo: A specialized helmet for the X02 Tesla Power Armor, designed to protect against energy-based attacks while maintaining high resistance to environmental hazards.
Enclave X02 Tesla Power Armor Helmet
